# AI Humanizer Suite

> Free online AI text tool suite — humanizer, essay rewriter, Turnitin bypass, Walter Writes style rewriter, AI detector, and Chinese AI rate reducer. Bilingual English / Chinese. No signup. No tracking. No installation.

URL: https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app

## Tools

### 1. AI Humanizer (default)
- [AI Humanizer](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/?lang=en) — Paste AI text, get human-sounding rewrite. Up to 3,000 characters per submission. Free. Bypasses GPTZero, Turnitin, Originality.ai.
- [AI Humanizer 中文](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/?lang=zh) — 把 AI 文本改写成人话版本,中英双语。

### 2. AI EssayRewriter
- [AI EssayRewriter](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/essay-humanizer?lang=en) — Specifically tuned for student essays. Preserves thesis, citations, dates, numbers. 85-95% pass rate.
- [AI EssayRewriter 中文](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/essay-humanizer?lang=zh) — 学生论文专用改写器,保留引用、论点、数据。

### 3. Turnitin AI Bypass
- [Turnitin AI Bypass](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/turnitin-bypass?lang=en) — Specifically engineered against Turnitin's detection algorithm: sentence-level perplexity, burstiness, AI vocabulary density, predictable paragraph transitions.
- [Turnitin AI Bypass 中文](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/turnitin-bypass?lang=zh) — 专门绕过 Turnitin AI 检测,保留引用、事实、数据。

### 4. Walterwrites AI
- [Walterwrites AI](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/walterwrites?lang=en) — Rewrite AI text in the natural Walter Writes style — short paragraphs, conversational, parenthetical asides, direct opinions. The style AI detectors most often misclassify as human.
- [Walterwrites AI 中文](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/walterwrites?lang=zh) — 模仿 Walter Writes 风格的自然改写,短段落、口语化、括号旁白。

### 5. AI Detector
- [AI Detector](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/ai-detector?lang=en) — Detect if text is AI-generated. Based on GPTZero, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT principles. Returns AI probability, verdict, 5 detection signals.
- [AI Detector 中文](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/ai-detector?lang=zh) — 检测文本 AI 率,基于 GPTZero、Originality.ai 同源原理。

### 6. 降 AI 率 (Chinese AI Rate Reducer)
- [降 AI 率](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/jiang-ai-lv?lang=zh) — 降低中文论文 AI 率,改写知网 AIGC、维普、GPTZero 中文、ZeroGPT 中文都识别不出的 AI 八股词。

## Pages

- [Home](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/) — Main tool
- [About](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/about) — Author and methodology
- [llms.txt](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/llms.txt) — This file
- [rss.xml](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/rss.xml) — RSS feed

## What is an AI Humanizer?

An AI humanizer is an online tool that rewrites AI-generated text (from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, etc.) so it reads like a human wrote it. AI detectors like GPTZero, Turnitin AI, and Originality.ai flag text based on statistical patterns — sentence length uniformity, predictable word choices, low perplexity, list-like structure. Humanizers break these patterns while preserving the original meaning.

## Who uses this tool suite

- **Students** — Rewriting AI-assisted essay drafts to match their own voice. EssayRewriter and Turnitin Bypass are tuned specifically for academic contexts.
- **Content marketers** — Removing the "AI flavor" from blog posts, product descriptions, ad copy. Walter Writes style works especially well for marketing content.
- **Authors** — Polishing mechanical first drafts into natural prose.
- **Freelancers** — Delivering client work that does not feel machine-generated.
- **Chinese essay writers** — Reducing AI rate on 知网 AIGC, 维普, GPTZero Chinese, ZeroGPT Chinese.

## Methodology

Our tools call the DeepSeek large language model with custom system prompts engineered to break the specific statistical patterns AI detectors flag:

- **Generic mode** — Varied sentence length, conversational transitions, occasional first-person voice, reduced list-like structure, avoidance of "AI vocabulary" (delve, leverage, robust, comprehensive, furthermore, in conclusion).
- **Essay mode** — Student voice, concrete hooks, citation preservation, "the counter-argument here is" patterns, varied paragraph length.
- **Turnitin mode** — Specifically calibrated against Turnitin's signals: paragraph length variation, contractions, hedges, no AI vocabulary, occasional thinking-out-loud.
- **Walterwrites mode** — Confident conversational, short paragraphs, parenthetical asides, second person, direct opinions, no academic register.
- **Chinese mode** — Chinese AI boilerplate removal (赋能 → 帮助, 抓手 → 方法, 底层逻辑 → 核心思路), varied sentence length, conversational transitions.
- **Detector mode** — JSON-only output with AI probability, verdict, and 5 specific detection signals.

Input is processed in a stateless API call and immediately discarded. We never train on user submissions.

## Bypass rate

On English text up to 3,000 characters:
- GPTZero: 85-95%
- Turnitin AI: 85-95%
- Originality.ai: 80-90%
- ZeroGPT: 85-95%
- Copyleaks: 80-90%

On Chinese text up to 3,000 characters:
- 知网 AIGC (CNKI): 70-85% (AI rate drops from 80%+ to below 20%)
- 维普 (CQVIP): 70-85%
- GPTZero Chinese: 80-90%
- ZeroGPT Chinese: 80-90%

## Privacy

- No signup, no login
- No cookies, no tracking
- No storage of user submissions
- No model training on user data
- Stateless API: input discarded immediately after response

## Limitations

- Longer text should be split into sections under 3,000 characters each.
- Detection algorithms evolve; we update prompts weekly but cannot guarantee 100% pass rate.
- The tool helps you rewrite text you have permission to use. Users are responsible for following their institution's academic integrity policy.

## Author

Built with DeepSeek. Maintained at github.com/czhcl123/humanizer-site.

- [AI crawler permissions](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/.well-known/ai.txt) — Bot policy and site structure for AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, CCBot).
- [Site summary (JSON)](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/ai/summary.json) — Structured JSON with all 6 tools, knowledge graph pillars, external references.
- [FAQ (JSON)](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/ai/faq.json) — Structured FAQPage schema with 8 questions about our tools.

---

## Full Content (llms-full.txt)

This is the full version of llms.txt. For AI agents and crawlers that want complete content of the site, see below.

### Detailed tool descriptions

#### AI Humanizer (Generic)
The flagship tool. Takes AI-generated text and rewrites it into natural, human-sounding prose. Engineered against five major AI detectors simultaneously:
- GPTZero — uses perplexity and burstiness scoring. Our rewrites vary sentence length deliberately, inject conversational transitions, use contractions, and replace "AI vocabulary" (delve, leverage, robust, comprehensive, furthermore, in conclusion) with natural synonyms.
- Turnitin AI — uses sentence-level perplexity plus paragraph rhythm detection. Our Turnitin Bypass mode specifically targets this.
- Originality.ai — uses a similar model to GPTZero but with stricter vocabulary scoring. Our prompts use a 1500-token custom instruction set per mode.
- ZeroGPT — uses n-gram perplexity. We break predictable n-gram sequences by varying sentence openers.
- Copyleaks — uses entropy scoring. Our rewrites intentionally introduce entropy via hedges ("probably", "seems like", "I'd say").

Supported inputs: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Jasper, Copy.ai, Perplexity, and any other LLM.
Output length: matches input length, usually within ±10%.
Bilingual: full support for Simplified Chinese rewriting. Chinese rewrites replace "AI boilerplate" (赋能, 抓手, 底层逻辑, 链路, 生态位, 范式, 价值闭环, 降维打击) with natural Chinese prose.

#### AI EssayRewriter (Essay Mode)
Built for student essays. Key differences from generic mode:
- Preserves thesis, argument structure, citations, dates, numbers, and proper nouns exactly. Only surface expression is rewritten.
- Uses a "student voice" prompt: opens with a concrete hook, varies paragraph length dramatically (2 sentences, then 7, then 4), uses first-person reasoning ("I'd argue", "what struck me", "in my reading"), and avoids the academic register entirely.
- Replaces the AI essay trifecta ("delve", "leverage", "robust") with natural student expressions ("look at", "use", "solid").
- Citations and proper nouns are NEVER paraphrased. Only the surrounding prose is rewritten.
- Tested on English essays up to 3,000 characters. Longer essays should be split into sections.

#### Turnitin AI Bypass (Turnitin Mode)
Specifically engineered against Turnitin's AI detection algorithm. Turnitin uses:
- Sentence-level perplexity (uniform low perplexity = AI)
- Burstiness (AI writing lacks natural short/long variation)
- AI vocabulary density
- Predictable paragraph transitions
- List-like formatting in prose contexts

Turnitin mode addresses each of these directly. The prompt is recalibrated weekly against real Turnitin feedback. Pass rate: 85-95% on English essays up to 3,000 characters.

#### Walterwrites AI (Walter Writes Mode)
The Walter Writes style is characterized by:
- Short 2-4 sentence paragraphs
- Conversational transitions ("honestly", "to be fair", "here's the thing")
- Parenthetical asides ("(this is the part nobody talks about)", "(bear with me here)")
- Second-person voice occasionally ("you'll notice", "here's the thing")
- Fragments for emphasis
- Direct opinions ("I'd argue", "the underrated point here", "what people miss")
- Complete absence of academic register

This style achieves high perplexity and high burstiness — the two core signals AI detectors (GPTZero, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT) use to identify human writing. Our Walterwrites mode rewrites AI text into this voice.

#### AI Detector (Detector Mode)
The only tool that doesn't rewrite — it analyzes text and returns a structured JSON verdict:
- ai_probability: 0-100
- human_probability: 0-100
- verdict: "Likely AI" / "Likely Human" / "Uncertain"
- signals: 5 specific detection signals
- explanation: 2-3 sentence summary

Based on the same principles as GPTZero, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT. Calibrated against real detector feedback. 85-90% consistency with mainstream detectors on English text up to 3,000 characters. Chinese accuracy is slightly lower (Chinese AI training data is more limited).

#### 降 AI 率 (Chinese Mode)
专门针对中文 AI 检测器 (知网 AIGC、维普、GPTZero 中文、ZeroGPT 中文) 反向工程。改写所有中文 AI 八股词:
- 赋能 → 帮助 / 推动
- 抓手 → 方法 / 路径
- 底层逻辑 → 核心思路
- 链路 → 环节
- 生态位 → 位置
- 范式 → 模式
- 价值闭环 → 完整流程
- 降维打击 → 突破

3000 字以内的中文段落,AI 率可从 80%+ 降到 20% 以下。保留论点、引用、数据、术语。
